modes.label: Ask
modes.description: Simple question and answer. The LLM responds directly to your message.

modes.label: Agent
modes.description: Agentic mode. The LLM can run scripts and tools to accomplish tasks autonomously.

modes.label: Plan
modes.description: Planning mode. The LLM breaks down your request into steps and outlines an action plan before executing.

modes.label: Gather Research
modes.description: Research mode. Uses Tavily web search guided by your conversation to find relevant information. Results appear as interactive cards you can index or parse.
